title: Bonus: Drop Us A Line - Will We Pass The Inspection?
content:
Andy, James and Anna(!) sift through the correspondence sent in by listeners.

Don't forget about our live shows at the Royal Institution in July: nosuchthingasafish.com/Risummer

Visit nosuchthingasafish.com for news about live shows, merchandise and more episodes.

If you'd like to write in, you can email podcast@qi.com

Edited by Joe Mayo and Dan Schreiber

Produced by Leying Lee

Team includes Tara Dorrell and Ethan Ruparelia
